notes: RC parser is bound to GP4 sensor input CAN channels
INS parser is bound to GP4 sensor input channels
Motor driver is bound to GP3 actuator output channels
SoC adapter is bound to the unique SoC to MCU port on GP2
Flight control may run on GP1 or GP2 but must stay on ASIL-D MCU
Radar perception is a SoC-domain function with compute mismatch penalties on non-native resources
Camera perception is a SoC-domain function with compute mismatch penalties on non-native resources
Planning is a SoC-domain function with compute mismatch penalties on non-native resources
Telemetry manager is a SoC-domain communication function
MCU communication manager is a SoC-domain communication function
